description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGreen faux leather bag with panelling and metal ring detail in frontThree main compartments with magnetic and  zippered closuresZippered pocket and branding at the backSynthetic lining with zippered pocketTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 23 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 14 cm
